msg.soulslikeregen.exhausted.title: ⚠ Capacity Exhausted
msg.soulslikeregen.exhausted.subtitle: Natural healing blocked
msg.soulslikeregen.exhausted.chat: Your regeneration capacity is full. Find a resting zone (Nexus, Inn, Campfire, Bed, Waystone) to recover.
msg.soulslikeregen.nexus.entered: You are in your team's Nexus. Recovering fatigue...
msg.soulslikeregen.inn.warmup: You are in a resting zone. Fatigue recovery starts in %s seconds.
msg.soulslikeregen.rest.full.title: ✔ Fully Rested
msg.soulslikeregen.rest.full.chat: Your fatigue has been fully cleared at a %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.level_up.title: ⬆ Level Up!
msg.soulslikeregen.level_up.subtitle: Regen capacity: %s → %s half-hearts
msg.soulslikeregen.level_up.chat: Reached level %s! Max capacity increased to %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.bonus.day: ✦ Survived a full day without damage. Fatigue reduced by %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.bonus.bed: Rested in a bed. Fatigue reduced by %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.nexus.set: Set Team Nexus for team '%s' at coordinates [%s, %s, %s] with radius %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.nexus.edit_ra: Updated Nexus for team '%s' radius to %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.nexus.edit_co: Updated Nexus for team '%s' coordinates to [%s, %s, %s].
msg.soulslikeregen.command.nexus.team_no: Team '%s' not found. Please verify the party team name.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.inn.set: Set Inn '%s' at coordinates [%s, %s, %s] with radius %s.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.inn.name_take: An Inn with the name '%s' already exists.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.no_permission: You do not have permission to execute this command.
msg.soulslikeregen.command.only_player: Only players can execute this subcommand.
